sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9699" key="a)ntepista/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντεπι-στάτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n9699.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vice-president,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοῦ Μουσείου</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Recueilde Travaux</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2200.tlg008:37:94" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">37.94</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Denderah</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
